entry.title: Vendor block -> MIRO
entry.content:
Hello,

i have a business requirement to make vendor block available in BP master data present in MIRO during LIV posting. Any help is appreciated.

Thanks!!

entry.title: How to automatically block for payment a document reopened during FF.5 bank statement import?
entry.content:
Olá Comunidade!

Hello Community!

I'm facing a functional challenge in the Financial Accounting (FI) module of SAP S/4HANA 2023 On-Premise, and I’d appreciate your help!

I'm trying to implement a solution where documents that are automatically reopened during the bank statement import via transaction FF.5 are automatically blocked for payment.

Scenario:

The bank sends, within the statement, a payment rejection instruction.
During the execution of FF.5, based on the configuration in OT83, the system reverses the clearing and reopens the original document.

The business team would like this reopened document not to be picked up again automatically by the F110S payment job, until it is manually reviewed to confirm whether the payment should actually be made.

Objective:

To prevent inadvertently re-paying documents reopened by FF.5, by automatically applying a payment block (ZLSPR) during the FF.5 execution.

My question:

Is there any BAdI, user-exit, or configuration that allows documents reopened via FF.5 to be automatically blocked for payment?

Any guidance is much appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Upload General Journal Entry - Incomplete documents
entry.content:
Hi, 

Our customer running a S4 cloud public edition project and will mainly use Upload General Journal Entries for theire accounting purposes. They will use the predelivered template and upload journal entry templates resulting in several accounting documents in several different company codes.

It seems like when you upload a file with several documents included the system will post the ones that are correct and the other ones will end up in error/fail. The customer would prefer that in the cases of errors no posting is made so that they can correct in the original file and then upload the same file again. I've been searching for this and checking forums but can't find anything about this. Does anyone knows if this is possible? 

Kind Regards, Sanne

entry.title: SAP CO: Cost Centers CDS Extractors?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community, 

we are currently looking for CO CDS extractors that replace the old SAPI extractors. Most extractors could have been replaced (especially master data extractors) but we can not find equivalents to the Cost Center extractors:

0CO_OM_CCA_1 ???

0CO_OM_CCA_9 ???

 

For Statistical Key Figure Items (0CO_OM_CCA_4) we have found C_StatisticalKeyFigureItem that looks quite the same as the old extractor. Statistical Key Figures - Actuals 

 

Background: Customer has SAP R/3 System, connected to BW and switches now to S/4HANA Cloud. BW should get the new data from S/4 with the same structure in order to have as minimal changes as possible in BW. Therefore we are looking for extractors with similar structure. 

 

Thanks in advance for you help!

entry.title: How to delete FI document generated from Goods Receipt and Service Entry Sheet
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We are facing a challenge during a phased SAP implementation and would appreciate your insights.

Context:

- SAP MM (Materials Management) was implemented and has been in use since 2020.

- During operations, the system has automatically generated FI documents when users performed Goods Receipt (GR) and Service Entry Sheet (SES).

- In 2025, we are now implementing SAP FICO. However, the accounting team does not accept the auto-generated FI postings that occurred before the FICO go-live.

- They require these postings to be completely removed from the system to ensure data consistency and integrity in the financial ledger.

Questions:

1. Is there any SAP-standard or technical way to delete these auto-generated FI documents (keep Material Doc)?

2. If deletion is not possible, are there any recommended alternative approaches to handle this situation?

Any guidance, technical insights, or real-world experience would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Accounting posting should be split per item level at the time of posting in BSEG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hi Experts,

My client is asking us if it is possible to split account documents per item level at the time of posting in BSEG.

This question came up because of the condition contract rebate process. In standard, the rebate amounts are captured based on the material and posted to accounting as a cumulative amount.

Those amounts can be viewed in the entry view in the BSEG table.

EX:

GL account Discription Amount 
12345678Apple customer 66,91,741
98376904Gross Sales 3rd pty10,915,344-
67253987LT Price Red On Inv48,04,934
78308376Growth/scale Off CN5,11,924
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.-511,924
22734087Output tax account-318,654
23974576Gross Sales 3rd pty-527,040
12874084Oth Cust spc trms On2,64,363

GL 29873648 we are using to post the rebate amount -511,924 the a cumulative amount from the sales order.

Now client expectation is To be:

GL account Discription Amount 
12345678Apple customer 66,91,741
98376904Gross Sales 3rd pty10,915,344-
67253987LT Price Red On Inv48,04,934
78308376Growth/scale Off CN5,11,924
22734087Output tax account318,654-
23974576Gross Sales 3rd pty527,040-
12874084Oth Cust spc trms On2,64,363
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.61,716-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.13,886-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.61,858-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.13,918-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.108,322-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.24,372-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.84,460-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.30,406-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.76,125-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.27,405-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.2,364-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.2,364-
29873648Acc. TTS/Cust. Act.

4,728-

 

Please let me know is this split can be updated  in BSEG table and in SAP it can be achievable.

If Yes, Please let me know how this can be achieved  

Regards,

Dinesh kumar.P

entry.title: VIM Taking other Business partner when invoice comes with same amount and reference num but
entry.content:
Vendor sending same Invoice with same $ and Reference repeatedly,

Invoices are coming twice into VIM as system doesn’t flag it as duplicate because,

Main BP
171520868

It has Partners in the same BP
1716202376
1717293934

1st Invoice coming with same amount and Reference and processing for main BP 171520868,
Again, d same invoice is coming and processing with 1716202376, it’s not suspecting it as duplicate.

We do not have, /OTX/PF_BC_VNDR_IDENT or /OTX/PF_VNDR_RULES configurations in SAP VIM 16.3 BC, also don't have BC sets for this vendor thing to activate.

invoices come through Gmail into SAP from vendor.


How can we overcome this please help in detail.

 

Thanks In Advance.

entry.title: Information on reset and reverse document.
entry.content:
I have clearing document which was reset and reversed. Now how can I identify this clearing doc was generated for which original document.
ex

Document No: 1 (Having clearing Document No as 2)
Now I have Reset and reversed the Document No 2.

Now how would I trace back that 1 was the Document No which initially got cleared against doc 2.

entry.title: Amount In LC- Goods Receipt (Asset Purchase Order (PO))
entry.content:
Hello, 

After performing a Goods Receipt (GR) with movement type 101 for a Purchase Order (PO) with account assignment category "A" (Asset), the Amount in Local Currency (LC) is not displayed in the PO History tab or in relevant tables like MSEG or EKBE.

As per my understanding, this is due to the "GR non-valuated" checkbox being selected for the asset account assignment. In such cases, the amount is only updated after the Invoice Receipt (IR) is posted via MIRO.

Before the IR is posted, is there any standard way to view or track the GR amount for such Asset POs?

Thanks in advance for your answers!

entry.title: I have requirement of restricting the user to change the other companies posting period from ob52
entry.content:
Hi,

I have requirement of restricting the user to change the other companies posting period from ob52. When the restricted user tried to select the other Posting period variant, system should restrict him.  

For example below 0001 and 0002, if the restricted user try to select the 0002 and click apply, the user should not allow to go next screen. 

Am not looking based on authorization group, restriction should happen from the selection "psting period variant" field.

Expecting advice from experts. 

Regards

Hashir

entry.title: Cayman (KY) calculation procedure
entry.content:
Hi All,

I created a new company code in the Cayman Islands,

and when I open an order for this company, an error occurs in FV60

"FF703 - Company code not assigned to country or country to calculation procedure"

There appears to be no SAP standard calculation procedure for the Cayman Islands. Should I build?

There are some articles in the community, but it seems that there is no conclusion

Thanks All !!

entry.title: ‘State/Payer’s state no’ is not populated in below 1099 Forms
entry.content:
Hello,

‘State/Payer’s state no’ is not populated in below 1099 Forms. What configuration or master data needs to be maintained in SAP for the 1099 form to populate the value.

  • For Form 1099-NEC - The ‘State/Payer’s state no’ is reported on Box 6
  • For Form 1099-MISC - The ‘State/Payer’s state no’ is reported on Box 17
  • For Form 1099-INT - The ‘‘State identification no’ is reported on Box 16
  • For Form 1099-DIV - The ‘State identification no’ is reported on Box 15
  • For Form 1099-R - The ‘State/Payer’s state no’ is reported on Box 15
  • For Form 1099-K - The ‘State identification no’ is reported on Box 7
  • For Form 1099-B -  The ‘‘State identification no’ is reported on Box 15
  • For Form 1099-G- The ‘‘State identification no’ is reported on Box 10b

Thanks.

entry.title: Group currency value to be 0 in FX reval posting when document currency = group currency
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm encountering an issue during foreign currency (FX) revaluation in SAP S/4HANA where the group currency (Group Curr) amount is not zero, even though the document currency group is the same as the group currency.

Scenario:
Company Code Currency: INR

Group Currency: USD

A journal entry is posted in USD (Document Currency & Group Currency = USD)

Issue:
When we run Foreign Currency Valuation, the system is generating FX revaluation entries with a non-zero amount in group currency. However, since the document currency group = group currency group, I expect group currency amount to be zero, as no currency translation should be necessary between same currencies.

Questions:
Is there a configuration or BAdI to modify this translation?

Is this a standard behavior or a known issue?

How can we suppress group currency FX revaluation when both document and group currencies are the same?

Any insights or recommendations would be appreciated.

entry.title: FSCM CM: Net Value of the itens from MM origin application
entry.content:
Hy gurus, 

I'd like to know if there is any customizing that I can update objects from MM with NET + TAX amount in FQM_FLOW table.  Nowadays I have only net amount in Cash Flow Analyzer.

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards

Att

RL

entry.title: SAP B1 10.0 Multi-branch Balance Sheets?
entry.content: Is it possible to generate a separate balance sheet for each branch in SAP B1 10.0 in addition to a consolidated balance sheet?

entry.title: Discrepancy Analysis of Cross-currency Balances
entry.content:
First, open the application named "Display Customer Summary China".

 

Next, enter the query conditions to check the balance for December 2024, and it shows that the USD balance is 0.

 

Then, enter the query conditions again to look for the data of January 2025, and the initial balance of USD is displayed as 51.06.

 

 
It can be seen from the above that the balance at the end of December 2024 is inconsistent with the balance at the beginning of January 2025. After further analysis, it is found that the discrepancy is caused by the clearing of accounts between USD and CNY. However, this type of business is a normal operation. The problem is that the current report system is not capable of querying transaction currency balances across different currencies.

entry.title: Delivery block is getting removed automatically when Down Payment request is cleared
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I'm Facing one issue with regards to Down Payment Processing through Milestone billing.

I have created one Sales Order with item category CBAO, entered Billing Plan date and value at Item level and save the order. Then I created a down Payment request through VF01 and then cleared it. But I can't find any Down Payment status either at header or at item level. And the Delivery block is still there, It's not getting removed automatically upon Down Payment clearance.

Could anyone please tell me what could be the possible reasons?

Regards,

Seemita.

entry.title: Depreciations of assets in foreign currency
entry.content:
Dear colleagues, 

I would like to ask whether there is a solution to maintaining depreciation areas in foreign currency that would post the depreciation in other currency other than the one set up for Company Code. 

Current setup - Chart of depreciation has one 01 leading Depreciation area in IFRS and one 10 in GAAP.  Company code currency is PHP, and client needs to do the depreciation in EUR and USD. we tried setting up the parallel currency based on the knowledge article Parallel Currencies in depreciation areas , where based on this article the postings are translated to Free Defined Currency 1 and Free Defined Currency 2, and depreciation areas in EUR and USD are set up as Areas Do not Post,   but this solution is not feasible for the client as they want to lower the acquisition value if in EUR by only in EUR, and this solution gives only overview of the depreciation translated to EUR and the depreciation is done only in PHP.  

 

if acqusition is in EUR document currency and PHP company code currency the provided solution with new depreciation area for EUR give us right amounts for depreciation calculation but without actual posted amounts. The posting of depreciation is still only in leading depreciation area 01 with translation to free defined currencies EUR and USD which is not accepted by customer.

As per my understanding, under one accounting principle there can be only 1 leading depreciation are which posts in real time therefore EUR and USD areas would need to be set up as post depreciation only, here is a catch, the client wants to post the depreciation to the same GL accounts in 01 IFRS PHP and 20 IFRS EUR and 30 IFRS  USD. Ideally client want to choose that if Acquired Assets' document currency is in EUR, and company code currency is PHP, then the posting should be done only  in depreciation area for EUR, where posting of depreciation document currency is EUR and company code currency is PHP. 

Is there any reasonable solution for this? 

Thank you in advance. 

Best regards,

Lenka

entry.title: S_ALR_87012394 can be used with Fiori
entry.content: I would like to know if S_ALR_87012394 is working on Fiori or it's just SAP GUI. Thanks

entry.title: Is there any equivalent app to J3RKKRD / J3RKKRS on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system and looking for equivalent applications to the following on-premise programs:

J3RKKRD – Russia: G/L Account Balance

J3RKKRS – Russia: G/L Account Line Items

I’ve already searched in the Fiori App Library and found some apps that seem to have similar functionality. However, when I checked the Business Catalog listed in the library, I couldn’t find any matching catalogs available in our public cloud system for role assignment.

I would like to ask:

Are there standard apps in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud that are functionally equivalent to J3RKKRD and J3RKKRS?

If yes, what is the Business Catalog associated with them?

If the apps are available in the library but not in our system, is there any way to activate or request them? 

Thanks in advance for your support!
